context: Tests whether the agent writes a feature spec that is technology-agnostic (WHAT not HOW), uses FR-XXX and SC-XXX numbered requirements, includes Given/When/Then acceptance scenarios, uses a 2-4 word action-noun branch name, and avoids leaving many [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] placeholders by making reasonable assumptions.

checklist.name: No technology stack in spec
checklist.description: spec.md does NOT mention specific technologies, frameworks, databases, languages, or architectural patterns (e.g., no mention of REST, GraphQL, WebSocket, PostgreSQL, Redis, React, microservices)

checklist.name: FR-XXX numbered requirements
checklist.description: spec.md contains at least 4 functional requirements numbered with the FR-XXX pattern (e.g., FR-001, FR-002)

checklist.name: SC-XXX success criteria
checklist.description: spec.md contains at least 2 success criteria numbered with the SC-XXX pattern (e.g., SC-001, SC-002)

checklist.name: Given/When/Then scenarios
checklist.description: spec.md contains at least 4 acceptance scenarios in Given/When/Then format covering the sharing permission use cases

checklist.name: User stories present
checklist.description: spec.md contains explicitly labeled user stories (US-1, US-2, or similar) with role-based framing ('As a [role], I want to...')

checklist.name: Measurable success criteria
checklist.description: At least one SC-XXX success criterion includes a measurable/quantifiable element (a number, percentage, time measurement, or explicit condition)

checklist.name: Max 3 NEEDS CLARIFICATION
checklist.description: spec.md contains at most 3 [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] markers (agent makes reasonable assumptions rather than leaving many unresolved questions)

checklist.name: No implementation details
checklist.description: spec.md does NOT describe HOW the system will work internally (no database schemas, API endpoints, service names, file structures, or deployment configurations)

checklist.name: 2-4 word branch name
checklist.description: spec-report.md mentions a feature branch name that is 2-4 hyphenated words in action-noun format (e.g., 'doc-sharing', 'document-permissions', 'share-document-access')

checklist.name: Requirements.md checklist created
checklist.description: specs/004-doc-sharing/checklists/requirements.md exists and contains checklist items that evaluate requirement quality (not implementation correctness)
